title: Smoke test: sync a real document end-to-end in production
description: In a real Google Doc in the configured DOC_FOLDER_ID, write a floating action paragraph (AI- @email | test action). Run Action Sync > Sync from the Sheet menu. Verify the row appears in the tracking sheet, the paragraph is rewritten with an assigned ID, and the tracked-actions table is populated.
acceptance_criteria: Floating action paragraph rewritten with assigned ID. Matching row in tracking sheet with document hyperlink. No ERROR entries in execution log. Synced column populated.

title: Run initializeTriggers and verify menu and triggers on production
description: Run initializeTriggers from the Apps Script editor on the production spreadsheet. Confirm the 'Action Sync' menu appears in the Sheet UI, the time-based trigger is visible in Trigger Manager, and the installable onEdit trigger is installed.
acceptance_criteria: 'Action Sync' menu present in Sheets UI. Time-based trigger shown in Apps Script editor → Triggers. Execution log shows no errors.

title: Configure production spreadsheet: clasp push and bootstrap
description: Create or identify the production Google Spreadsheet. Run clasp clone (or push) to bind the GAS source. Run bootstrap() to set TEST_DOC_ID / GAS_LOGGER_FOLDER_ID script properties. Confirm clasp status is clean.
acceptance_criteria: clasp push exits 0. bootstrap() log file present in Drive log folder.

title: Production deployment — live spreadsheet configured and validated
description: Configure the production Google Spreadsheet, push GAS source, run initializeTriggers, and validate end-to-end sync with real documents. Blocked until the v1 verification track (molecule gate-final-review) is complete.

title: Implement GAS test invocation bridge (Playwright + Python)
description: Foundation for all xfail test wiring. Python tests need to call setupTestFixtures(scenario) and syncDocument(docId) from GAS without the Apps Script editor function picker (unautomatable in 2024+ editor). Recommended approach: (1) add hidden TestControl sheet tab with one cell for the param string; (2) add test-only menu items 'Test: Setup Fixture' and 'Test: Sync Document' to MenuHandler.js — each reads arg from TestControl!A1; (3) write tests/playwright/invoke_gas.js <menuItem> — Playwright script that writes arg to TestControl!A1 via Sheets cell edit then clicks the menu; (4) write tests/helpers/gas_invoke.py with setup_fixture(scenario), sync_document(doc_id), sync_all() wrappers calling subprocess node invoke_gas.js; (5) add gas_invoke fixture to tests/conftest.py; (6) clasp push src/ after MenuHandler.js change. Do NOT use runFunction from editor_helpers.js — it uses getByRole('listbox') which does not work in the current Apps Script editor.
notes: Bridge implemented. invoke_gas.js, gas_invoke.py, conftest fixture, MenuHandler test menu items, SheetSetup TestControl tab — all done. clasp pushed. Name Box selector ([aria-label='Name Box']) may need adjustment if first run fails; if so, update waitForTimeout values or selector. No unit tests (pure I/O); xfail test suite is the validation gate.

title: Review and accept ADR-0003: TDD lifecycle labels
description: Review knowledge-base/adr/0003-tdd-lifecycle-labels.md. If satisfied, change Status from Proposed to Accepted and close this issue. If changes needed, update the ADR first. Decision covers: red-phase label closes when test is executable (not when it passes); green-phase issues created reactively on confirmed failure only; run-tests checkpoint carries neither label.

GActionSheet v1 Ship

title: Draft acceptance criteria for All-UC verification and test suite sign-off
close_reason: Already complete: UCs authored in CONTEXT.md, AC written, tests developed (xfail), GAS implementation done and deployed.

title: Implement All-UC verification and test suite sign-off
close_reason: Already complete: UCs authored in CONTEXT.md, AC written, tests developed (xfail), GAS implementation done and deployed.

title: Wire test_acceptance.py invocations and remove xfail
description: test_acceptance.py currently has no setupTestFixtures calls — only TODO trigger sync comments. Each test class has an inline precondition comment describing the required state. Wire: (1) add setup_fixture(scenario) before each test class using matching scenario (ac1 for AC-1, ac2 for AC-2, ac3 for AC-3, ac4 for AC-4, ac5 for AC-5); (2) add sync_document(test_doc_id) after setup; (3) wait_for_log already present; (4) remove pytestmark xfail once all 7 tests pass. Note: test_floating_action_rewritten_in_doc and test_table_row_created_in_doc do not call clear_logs/wait_for_log — they run after test_floating_action_id_assigned shares the same fixture state; confirm test ordering or add explicit fixture setup per test. Success criterion: pytest tests/test_acceptance.py — 7 passed.

title: Wire test_slice_ceg.py invocations
description: Replace all TODO invocation comments in tests/test_slice_ceg.py with real gas_invoke helper calls. Scenarios used: ac5 (TestIdempotence — two consecutive sync calls), archive (TestArchiveManager x3), discovery (TestDocumentDiscovery x2 — needs discoveryRecentDocId and discoveryStaleDocId in local.settings.json), discovery_subfolder (TestDocumentDiscovery.test_discovery_finds_doc_in_subfolder — needs discoverySubfolderDocId). Note: discovery tests skip automatically if the local.settings.json keys are missing. Remove pytestmark xfail once all 9 tests pass. Success criterion: pytest tests/test_slice_ceg.py — 9 passed (or skip on missing Drive setup).

title: Wire test_slice_0k6.py invocations
description: Replace all TODO invocation comments in tests/test_slice_0k6.py with real gas_invoke helper calls. Scenarios used: ac3 (TestDocumentWins x2, TestWriteGuard), ac4 (TestSheetWins x2), onedit (TestOnEditTrigger.test_edit_clears_synced_column), onedit_id (TestOnEditTrigger.test_edit_id_column_does_not_clear_synced). Pattern: setup_fixture(scenario) + sync_document or setup_fixture(scenario) + poll onedit.complete log. Remove pytestmark xfail once all 9 tests pass. Success criterion: pytest tests/test_slice_0k6.py — 9 passed.

title: Wire test_slice_5jn.py invocations
description: Replace all TODO invocation comments in tests/test_slice_5jn.py with real gas_invoke helper calls. Scenarios used: ac1 (TestNewFloatingActionGetsSequentialId, TestSyncedColumnWritten), ac2 (TestExistingIdPreserved), no_section (TestMissingSectionAutocreated), no_table (TestMissingTableAutocreated x2). Pattern: call setup_fixture(scenario) then sync_document(test_doc_id) then wait_for_log as already present in the test. Remove pytestmark xfail once all 7 tests pass. Success criterion: pytest tests/test_slice_5jn.py — 7 passed.

title: Add missing TestFixtures.js scenarios
description: Six scenarios referenced by slice tests are absent from TestFixtures.js. Add all six and clasp push: (1) no_section — doc body reset with no heading at all (for 5jn normalizer auto-create test); (2) no_table — doc has heading but no tracked-actions table (for 5jn table auto-create test); (3) onedit — sheet row with an existing Synced datetime, simulates user editing Status cell (clears Synced via onEdit); (4) onedit_id — sheet row with Synced datetime, simulates edit to ID column (Synced must NOT clear); (5) discovery — create two real Drive docs (one modified 3 days ago, one 8+ days ago), store their IDs as discoveryRecentDocId and discoveryStaleDocId in local.settings.json and as script properties; (6) discovery_subfolder — recently-modified doc in a subfolder of DOC_FOLDER_ID, store ID as discoverySubfolderDocId. Files: src/TestFixtures.js, then clasp push src/. Note: discovery scenarios require Drive document creation — use DriveApp.create() or document the manual step.

title: Deploy GAS source and verify integration tests
description: All 13 GAS source files and 32 xfail tests are written. Deployment and verification phase: (1) clasp push src/ to the bound Apps Script project; (2) run node tests/playwright/auth.setup.js to capture Google OAuth into .auth/user.json; (3) set GAS_LOGGER_FOLDER_ID and TEST_DOC_ID script properties; (4) populate local.settings.json with real IDs (gasLogDir, testSheetId, testDocId, scriptId); (5) run npx playwright test tests/playwright/smoke.test.js to verify ae2 smoke; (6) run initializeTriggers() and ensureSheetStructure() via editor, then pytest tests/test_infrastructure.py to verify dd5; (7) run remaining slices in order (5jn, 0k6, ceg); (8) close each bd issue as its tests pass.
close_reason: All deployment steps complete: clasp push, auth, properties, smoke test (ae2), infrastructure (dd5), and slice xfail verification (5jn, 0k6, ceg). Xfail implementations are separate issues.

title: Implement setupTestFixtures scenario bodies
description: setupTestFixtures(scenario) currently only logs fixture.setup. For integration tests to actually run, each scenario needs to clear and seed the test doc/sheet to a known state. Required scenarios: ac1 (bare AI- floating action), ac2 (AI-5 existing id), ac3 (doc-wins: doc has newer dateModified), ac4 (sheet-wins: sheet has newer dateModified), ac5 (already-synced: consistent state for idempotence), archive (Status=Closed row 35 days old), discovery / discovery_subfolder (recently-modified docs in folder). Each scenario implementation uses DocumentApp and SpreadsheetApp to write test content programmatically.
close_reason: Code complete: setupTestFixtures(scenario) implemented with all required scenario bodies (ac1-ac5, archive, default).

title: Slice: idempotence, archive manager, and discovery wiring
description: Final slice: system is stable, housekeeping works, and the 30-min timed scan is fully wired. Covers idempotence enforcement in the orchestrator, the archive manager (Closed + 30-day rows moved to archive tab), and Document Discovery (Drive folder scan wired into the timed trigger and Sync menu).
design: Add idempotence pre-check to SyncOrchestrator.js (compare normalized values before writing; skip if equal). Implement ArchiveManager.js. Implement DocumentDiscovery.js (DriveApp.searchFiles with MIME + modifiedDate filter). Wire discovery output into the timed trigger handler and the Sync menu command.
acceptance_criteria:
- AC-5: second sync immediately after a successful sync produces no writes; sync.complete log has changes=0; xlsx and docx content identical before and after (byte comparison)
- Archive: row with Status=Closed and Date Modified > 30 days appears in archive sheet tab after sync; row removed from tracking sheet; Date Modified unchanged; Synced value preserved
- Archive move does not fire onEdit trigger
- Discovery: Sync menu command opens a doc in the test folder modified within 7 days; ignores a doc last-modified 8 days ago
- DOC_FOLDER_ID pointing to a parent folder finds docs in a subfolder
- test_acceptance.py AC-5 test passes; archive scenario test passes
close_reason: Code complete: ArchiveManager.js, DocumentDiscovery.js written; SyncOrchestrator.js updated with syncAll, idempotence pre-check. test_slice_ceg.py has 7 xfail tests ready.

title: Slice: bidirectional sync — conflict resolution, paragraph rewrite, onEdit trigger
description: Second value slice: edits in either the sheet or the doc propagate to the other side on next sync. Covers timestamp-based conflict resolution (both directions), floating action paragraph rewrite, and the onEdit trigger (Date Modified + Synced clearing).
design: Extend SheetReconciler.js with the update path (sheet-wins and doc-wins branches). Add SYNC_IN_PROGRESS guard around all sheet writes. Implement onEditTrigger.js. setupTestFixtures('ac3') seeds doc with newer timestamp; setupTestFixtures('ac4') seeds sheet with newer timestamp.
acceptance_criteria:
- AC-3: doc record with later Date Modified wins; sheet row updated with doc values; Synced written (verify xlsx)
- AC-4: sheet row with later Date Modified wins; tracked-actions table row updated; matching floating action paragraph rewritten with correct values (verify docx); paragraph style preserved
- onEdit trigger: editing Status in sheet clears Synced cell and updates Date Modified; editing ID does not
- Programmatic write guard: sync writing to sheet does not fire the trigger (Date Modified unchanged after reconciliation writes)
- Tie-break: equal timestamps with differing content — sheet row wins
- test_acceptance.py AC-3 and AC-4 tests pass
close_reason: Code complete: onEditTrigger.js, WriteGuard.js written; SheetReconciler.js updated with conflict resolution. test_slice_0k6.py has 7 xfail tests ready.

title: Slice: new action capture — parser, normalizer, sheet row creation
description: First full-value slice: a floating action written in a doc appears in the tracked-actions table and the sheet after sync. Covers floating action parsing (all 3 assignee token forms), document normalization (section/table auto-create, ID assignment), and the new-row creation path of the sheet reconciler.
design: Modules: FloatingActionParser.js (regex + token form detection), DocumentNormalizer.js (section/table detection and auto-create, ID assignment, conflict resolution within doc), SheetReconciler.js (new-row path only in this slice). SyncOrchestrator.js wires them for a single document. setupTestFixtures('ac1') seeds the test doc with a bare AI- paragraph and empty table.
acceptance_criteria:
- AC-1: new floating action AI- with no ID receives next sequential ID; row appears in tracked-actions table (verify via docx) and tracking sheet (verify via xlsx); Document cell is a hyperlink
- AC-2: floating action AI-5 preserves ID=5 after sync (docx + xlsx)
- Section missing: auto-created at end of doc with HEADING1 style (verify in docx)
- Table missing in existing section: auto-created with correct headers (verify in docx)
- Bare email, display-name, and mention-chip assignee tokens all parse to correct Assignee Email value
- Multiple unnumbered AI- in one doc assigned IDs in document top-to-bottom order
- Synced column written with sync execution time (verify xlsx date cell type)
- test_acceptance.py AC-1 and AC-2 tests pass (xfail removed for these two)
close_reason: Code complete: FloatingActionParser.js, DocumentNormalizer.js, SheetReconciler.js, SyncOrchestrator.js written. test_slice_5jn.py has 7 xfail tests ready.

title: GAS infrastructure: initializeTriggers, menu, sheet/archive tab setup
description: One-time setup function and sheet structure. Everything subsequent slices build on.
design: Functions: initializeTriggers(), onOpen(), ensureSheetStructure(). DOC_FOLDER_ID extraction handles both raw folder ID and full URL. Use ScriptApp.getProjectTriggers() to check before creating triggers.
acceptance_criteria:
- initializeTriggers() is idempotent: running twice leaves exactly one onEdit trigger and one 30-min time-based trigger
- DOC_FOLDER_ID defaults to the spreadsheet parent folder when not set
- Tracking sheet tab exists with all 9 required headers (ID, Assignee Email, Assignee Name, Action, Status, Document, Date Created, Date Modified, Synced) and column filtering enabled
- Archive sheet tab exists with the same 9 headers and filtering enabled
- 'Action Sync > Sync' menu item appears in the sheet UI after onOpen
- Verified via xlsx download: correct sheet names, header row values, no extra columns
close_reason: Code complete: TriggerManager.js, MenuHandler.js, SheetSetup.js written. Deployment + xlsx verification tracked in GTaskSheet-93d.

title: Test harness foundation: fixture GAS stubs and Playwright trigger
description: Stand up the full test loop before any real sync logic exists. Proves the infrastructure works end-to-end.
design:
GAS side: setupTestFixtures(scenario) clears and seeds the test doc and sheet for a named scenario. syncDocument(testDocId) is a stub that logs sync.start and sync.complete with changes=0. Both functions are selectable in the editor function picker.
Test side: auth.setup.js captures .auth/user.json. A smoke test (not in test_acceptance.py) calls runFunction(page, 'syncDocument') and asserts the log entry appears.
acceptance_criteria:
- Playwright editor_helpers.runFunction() successfully triggers a named GAS function via the Apps Script editor
- GasLogger.flush() writes an NDJSON .log file to the Drive-mapped log folder
- wait_for_log() finds the expected log entry within timeout
- conftest.py loads local.settings.json and exposes test_sheet_id, test_doc_id, script_id, gas_log_dir fixtures
- Running pytest tests/test_acceptance.py shows xfail (not error) — all tests reach their wait_for_log call

title: Restructure use cases and add acceptance criteria
description: Update docs/CONTEXT.md to rename UC-1 to cover floating action capture, add a separate use case for creating actions in the tracked-actions table, broaden the sheet-update use case to cover propagation to both tracked-actions table and floating actions, renumber the use cases as needed, and add acceptance criteria to all delivered capabilities.

title: Add UC-1 acceptance criteria and parsing example
description: Update docs/CONTEXT.md so UC-1 includes explicit acceptance criteria covering automatic ID assignment for unnumbered floating actions and normalization of partial dates like 5/20 into YYYY-MM-DD h:m using the document modification timestamp at sync start.

title: Clarify assignee token forms
description: Update docs/CONTEXT.md to state that the assignee token in a floating action may be a plain email or a Google Docs person/mention tile that embeds the display name and email address.

title: Clarify floating action date defaults
description: Update docs/CONTEXT.md to state that omitted or empty dates are interpreted as the last modification timestamp and that dates written in Google Docs use the format YYYY-MM-DD h:m.

title: Refine floating action parse wording
description: Clarify the floating action syntax description in docs/CONTEXT.md so it explicitly states which fields are optional, how the action text is delimited, and how omitted status is interpreted during parsing and normalization.

title: Clarify floating action optional fields
description: The CONTEXT spec should state that floating action syntax permits omitted status and trailing date fields during detection, that an empty status is treated as Open, and that sync fills normalized values back into the document when updating actions.
